---
title: "PCORI_SCD_data_cleaning_050526"
output: html_document
name: "Lizi Shao"
date: "2026-05-05"
---

ETL and cleaning of PCORI SCD data; we have all sites for ED & IC including Boston and Indiana.

# Clearing environment, loading raw data from REDCap
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
'setwd("setprojectdirectory")'
ls(); rm(list = ls()); gc();
require(gtsummary)
require(readr)
require(writexl)
require(readxl)
require(flextable)
require(officer)
require(magrittr)
require(tidyverse)
require(purrr)

df_ed <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/SCDInfusionCenterImp-EDData_DATA_2026-05-05_1628.csv")
df_ic <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/SCDInfusionCenterImp-ICData_DATA_2026-05-05_1629.csv")

if (length(excel_sheets("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/VCU_ED_rawdata.xlsx")) != 1) {
  multiple_sheets <- lapply(excel_sheets("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/VCU_ED_rawdata.xlsx"), 
                            \(s) read_excel("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/VCU_ED_rawdata.xlsx", sheet = s))
  names(multiple_sheets)
} else {
  df_ed_vcu <- read_excel("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/VCU_ED_rawdata.xlsx")
  print("one sheet only")
}

df_ic_vcu <- read.csv("\\\\win.ad.jhu.edu/Users$/HOME/SCD/vcu_ic 1.csv")

df_ic %>% names()
df_ic_vcu %>% names()
df_ed %>% names()
df_ed_vcu %>% names()
head(df_ed_vcu)


dfs <- list(df_ic = df_ic,
            df_ic_vcu = df_ic_vcu,
            df_ed = df_ed,
            df_ed_vcu = df_ed_vcu)

dfs <- lapply(dfs, as.data.frame)
list2env(dfs, envir = .GlobalEnv)
rm(dfs); gc()

class(df_ic); class(df_ic_vcu)
class(df_ed); class(df_ed_vcu)

str(list(df_ic,
         df_ic_vcu,
         df_ed,
         df_ed_vcu))

names(df_ed_vcu) <- as.character(df_ed_vcu[1,])
df_ed_vcu <- df_ed_vcu[-1,] %>% as.data.frame() #Run this once ONLY
df_ed_vcu$patient_id <- df_ed_vcu$ID; df_ed_vcu <- df_ed_vcu %>% select(-ID)
df_ed_vcu <- df_ed_vcu %>% relocate(patient_id, .before = 1)
head(df_ed_vcu)
```

# Label mapping
```{r}
label_to_code <- c(
  # ---------------- ED ----------------
  "Site ID"                                           = "ed_q02",
  "ED Location"                                       = "ed_q2_2",
  "Arrival Date (check-in time)"                      = "ed_q03",
  "Arrival Time"                                      = "ed_q04",
  "Arrival Date/Time CalcText"                        = "ed_q04_calctext",
  "Arrival Date/Time (check-in time)"                 = "ed_q04_dt",
  "First Medication Administration Date"               = "ed_q05_date",
  "First Medication Administration Time"              = "ed_q05",
  "First Medication CalcText"                         = "ed_q05_calctext",
  "First Medication Administration Date/Time"         = "ed_q05_dt",
  "Reasons for delay"                                 = "rea",
  "Last Medication Administration Time"               = "ed_q06",
  "Last Medication Administration Date/Time"          = "ed_q06_dt",
  "First Pain Score"                                  = "ed_q07",
  "Last Pain Score"                                   = "ed_q08",
  "Discharge Date"                                    = "ed_q16",
  "Discharge Time"                                    = "ed_q09",
  "Discharge Calctext"                                = "ed_q09_calctext",
  "Discharge Date/Time"                               = "ed_q09_dt",
  "Disposition End of Appointment"                    = "ed_q10",
  "If Disposition Other, Please Specify"              = "ed_q10_1",
  "Is this patient followed by your clinic?"          = "ed_q15",
  "Did this person contact the clinic or IC prior to being seen in the ED?" = "ed_q14",
  "Why were they not seen in the IC?"                 = "ed_q14_1",
  "Calculated Length of Time in ED"                   = "ed_q12",
  "Calculated Length of Time in ED (Date/Time)"       = "ed_q12_dt",
  "Calculated Time to First Dose"                     = "ed_q11",
  "Calculated Time to First Dose (Date/Time)"         = "ed_q11_dt",
  "Calculated Change in Pain Score"                   = "ed_q13",
  'Date Data Entered (Click "Today")'                 = "ed_data",
  "Notes"                                             = "ed_notes",
  "Complete?"                                         = "ed_instrument_complete",
  "If other, please specify"                          = "ed_q14_1_1",

  # ---------------- IC ----------------
  "How did the patient connect with the IC?"          = "ic_q18",
  "Visit Date"                                        = "ic_q03",
  "Day of the Week"                                   = "ic_q14",
  "Visit Time"                                        = "ic_q04",
  "Arrival Calctext"                                  = "ic_q04_calctext",
  "Visit Date/Time (check-in time)"                   = "ic_q04_dt",
  "Arrived From"                                      = "ic_q10",
  "First Medication Administration Date"              = "ic_q05_date",
  "First Medication Administration Time"              = "ic_q05",
  "First Medication Calctext"                         = "ic_q05_calctext",
  "First Medication Administration Date/Time"         = "ic_q05_dt",
  "Last Medication Administration Time"               = "ic_q06",
  "Last Medication Administration Date/Time"          = "ic_q06_dt",
  "First Pain Score"                                  = "ic_q07",
  "Last Pain Score"                                   = "ic_q08",
  "Discharge Date"                                    = "ic_q09_date",
  "Discharge Time"                                    = "ic_q09",
  "Discharge Calctext"                                = "ic_q09_calctext",
  "Discharge Date/Time"                               = "ic_q09_dt",
  "Disposition"                                       = "ic_q11",
  "If Disposition Other, Please Specify"              = "ic_q11_1",
  "Acute Return to ED or IC Within 7 Days"            = "ic_q12",
  "Hospital Admission Within 7 Days"                  = "ic_q13",
  "Calculated Time to First Dose"                     = "ic_q15",
  "Calculated Time to First Dose (Date/Time)"         = "ic_q15_dt",
  "Calculated Length of Time in IC"                   = "ic_q16",
  "Calculated Length of Time in IC (Date/Time)"       = "ic_q16_dt",
  "Calculated Change in Pain Score"                   = "ic_q17",
  'Date Data entered (Click "Today")'                 = "ic_data",
  "Notes"                                             = "ic_notes",
  "Complete?"                                         = "ic_instrument_complete"

  # IC-specific "If other, please specify" (for Arrived From = Other)
  # WARNING: this label is identical to the ED one; you cannot map both at once without disambiguation.
  # "If other, please specify"                        = "ic_q10_1"
)
```

# Data cleaning for IC
```{r}
##Consort table
#Blank Table to Build Consort Data
consort_table <- data.frame(
  step = character(),
  included = numeric(),
  excluded = numeric(),   # should be numeric to match NA_real_
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

consort_table <- rbind(consort_table, 
                       data.frame(step = "Raw data: all sites",
                                  included = nrow(df_ic) + nrow(df_ic_vcu),
                                  excluded = NA_real_
                                  ))

##Look at minimally useful columns
intersect(names(df_ic_vcu), names(df_ic)); setdiff(names(df_ic_vcu), names(df_ic)); setdiff(names(df_ic_vcu), names(df_ic_vcu))

##Rename
dfs <- list(df_ic = df_ic,
            df_ic_vcu = df_ic_vcu)

dfs <- lapply(dfs, \(df) {
  df$site_id <- df$ic_q02
  df$first_painscore <- df$ic_q07
  df$last_painscore <- df$ic_q08
  df$arrived_from <- df$ic_q10
  df$disposition <- df$ic_q11
  df$disposition_other <- df$ic_q11_1
  df$acute_return_7days <- df$ic_q12
  df
})


##Standardize missingness

#What classes are present in each df (and how many columns of each class)
type_summary <- lapply(dfs, \(d) {
  cls <- sapply(d, \(x) class(x)[1])  
  sort(table(cls), decreasing = TRUE)
})

type_summary

#Possible missingness strings
missing_chr <- c("", "na", "n/a", "null", "none", "unknown", "unk", ".", "..", "-", "--")
missing_num <- c(-9, -99, -999, 999, 9999)

dfs <- lapply(dfs, \(df) {
  df %>%
    # 1) character: trim whitespace + convert common "missing strings" to NA
    mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) {
      x <- trimws(x)
      x[tolower(x) %in% missing_chr] <- NA_character_
      x
    })) %>%
    # 2) numeric: convert sentinel codes to NA
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) {
      x[x %in% missing_num] <- NA_real_
      x
    })) %>%
    # 3) integer: convert sentinel codes to NA
    mutate(across(where(is.integer), \(x) {
      x[x %in% missing_num] <- NA_integer_
      x
    })) 
})

##Handle datetime
dfs$df_ic <- dfs$df_ic %>% 
  mutate(checkin_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q04_dt, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC"),
         firstmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q05_dt, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC"),
         lastmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q06_dt, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC"),
         discharge_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q09_dt, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC")
  )
dfs$df_ic_vcu <- dfs$df_ic_vcu %>% 
  mutate(checkin_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q04_dt, orders = "mdy HM", tz = "UTC"),
         firstmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q05_dt, orders = "mdy HM", tz = "UTC"),
         lastmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q06_dt, orders = "mdy HM", tz = "UTC"),
         discharge_datetime = parse_date_time(ic_q09_dt, orders = "mdy HM", tz = "UTC")
  )


#check
head(dfs$df_ic$checkin_datetime)
head(dfs$df_ic$ic_q04_dt)
head(dfs$df_ic$firstmedadmin_datetime)
head(dfs$df_ic$ic_q05_dt)

head(dfs$df_ic_vcu$checkin_datetime)
head(dfs$df_ic_vcu$ic_q04_dt)
head(dfs$df_ic_vcu$firstmedadmin_datetime)
head(dfs$df_ic_vcu$ic_q05_dt)

##Normalize text
dfs <- lapply(dfs, \(df) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) tolower(trimws(x))))
})

##Check for missingness
cols <- c("first_painscore","last_painscore","arrived_from","disposition",
          "disposition_other","acute_return_7days","checkin_datetime",
          "firstmedadmin_datetime","lastmedadmin_datetime","discharge_datetime")

missingness <- imap_dfr(dfs, \(dat, nm) {
  tibble(
    df = nm,
    column = cols,
    missing_n = sapply(cols, \(cl) sum(is.na(dat[[cl]]))),
    missing_pct = sapply(cols, \(cl) mean(is.na(dat[[cl]])) * 100)
  )
})

missingness %>% print(n = 24)

all_missing_counts <- imap_dfr(dfs, \(dat, nm) {
  tibble(
    df = nm,
    n_all_missing = dat %>% summarise(n = sum(if_all(all_of(cols), is.na))) %>% pull(n),
    pct_all_missing = n_all_missing / nrow(dat) * 100
  )
})

all_missing_counts

any_missing_counts <- imap_dfr(dfs, \(dat, nm) {
  n_any <- dat %>% summarise(n = sum(if_any(all_of(cols), is.na))) %>% pull(n)
  tibble(
    df = nm,
    n_any_missing = n_any,
    pct_any_missing = n_any / nrow(dat) * 100
  )
})

any_missing_counts

missingness_repeated_instrument <- imap_dfr(list(df_ic = dfs$df_ic[dfs$df_ic$redcap_repeat_instrument %>% is.na(),], 
                                                 df_ic_vcu = dfs$df_ic_vcu[dfs$df_ic_vcu$redcap_repeat_instrument  %>% is.na(),]), \(dat, nm) {
  tibble(
    df = nm,
    column = cols,
    missing_n = sapply(cols, \(cl) sum(is.na(dat[[cl]]))),
    missing_pct = sapply(cols, \(cl) mean(is.na(dat[[cl]])) * 100)
  )
})

missingness_repeated_instrument

##Combine data
cols <- c("patient_id", "site_id", "redcap_event_name", "redcap_repeat_instrument", "redcap_repeat_instance", cols, "ic_notes",
          "ic_instrument_complete")

dfs$df_ic_vcu$patient_id <- paste0("sitei-", sprintf("%04d", as.integer(dfs$df_ic_vcu$patient_id)))
dfs$df_ic_vcu$site_id <- "VCU SITEI"

df_ic <- bind_rows(select(dfs$df_ic, all_of(cols)), 
                   select(dfs$df_ic_vcu, all_of(cols)))

##Filter noninformative entries (fields all missing)
useful_cols <- c("first_painscore","last_painscore","arrived_from","disposition",
          "disposition_other","acute_return_7days","checkin_datetime",
          "firstmedadmin_datetime","lastmedadmin_datetime","discharge_datetime", "ic_notes", "ic_instrument_complete")

df_ic <- df_ic %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(redcap_repeat_instrument) &
      !if_all(all_of(useful_cols), ~ is.na(.))
  )

consort_table <- rbind(consort_table, 
                       data.frame(step = "Removing noninformative entries",
                                  included = nrow(df_ic),
                                  excluded = consort_table$included[1] - nrow(df_ic)
                                  ))


minimally_useful <- c("first_painscore","last_painscore","arrived_from","disposition","acute_return_7days","checkin_datetime",
          "firstmedadmin_datetime","lastmedadmin_datetime","discharge_datetime")
missing_profile <- df_ic %>%
    mutate(number_of_variables_missing = rowSums(is.na(across(all_of(minimally_useful))))) %>%
    count(number_of_variables_missing, name = "n_rows") %>%
    arrange(desc(number_of_variables_missing))   

missing_profile

##Extreme values
summary(df_ic[,minimally_useful])

##Implausible date values
datetime <- c("checkin_datetime","firstmedadmin_datetime","lastmedadmin_datetime","discharge_datetime")

df_ic1 <- df_ic %>% 
  filter(!if_any(all_of(datetime), ~ !is.na(.) & . < as.POSIXct("2023-04-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC")))

consort_table <- rbind(consort_table, 
                       data.frame(step = "df_ic1: After 04/23",
                                  included = nrow(df_ic1),
                                  excluded = consort_table$included[2] - nrow(df_ic1)
                                  ))

#Check firstmed after checkin date time AND  and multiple visits in a day
df_ic2 <- df_ic1 %>%
  mutate(
    implausible_time_order_timetofirstmed =
      !is.na(checkin_datetime) & !is.na(firstmedadmin_datetime) &
      !(checkin_datetime <= firstmedadmin_datetime)
  )
sum(df_ic2$implausible_time_order_timetofirstmed, na.rm = TRUE)

df_ic2 <- df_ic2 %>% 
  filter(!implausible_time_order_timetofirstmed)

nrow(df_ic2)

df_ic2 <- df_ic2 %>%
  mutate(checkin_date = as.Date(checkin_datetime)) %>%
  arrange(patient_id, checkin_date, checkin_datetime) %>%
  group_by(patient_id, checkin_date) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-checkin_date)

nrow(df_ic2)

consort_table <- rbind(consort_table, 
                       data.frame(step = "df_ic2: firstmed after checkin date time",
                                  included = nrow(df_ic2),
                                  excluded = consort_table$included[3] - nrow(df_ic2)
                                  ))

#Check impossible date values (e.g., discharge before med given)
df_ic3 <- df_ic2 %>%
  mutate(
    implausible_time_order_full =
      !is.na(checkin_datetime) & !is.na(firstmedadmin_datetime) &
      !is.na(lastmedadmin_datetime) & !is.na(discharge_datetime) &
      !(checkin_datetime <= firstmedadmin_datetime &
          firstmedadmin_datetime <= lastmedadmin_datetime &
          lastmedadmin_datetime <= discharge_datetime)
  )
sum(df_ic3$implausible_time_order_full, na.rm = TRUE)

#Below code does this: Fix date entry errors: if exactly 3 dates share the same date and 1 differs, correct the odd one to match (keeps original time)
df_ic3 <- df_ic3 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # extract dates only (ignore time)
    d1 = as.Date(checkin_datetime),
    d2 = as.Date(firstmedadmin_datetime),
    d3 = as.Date(lastmedadmin_datetime),
    d4 = as.Date(discharge_datetime)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # find which date is the odd one out
    dates_vec = list(c(d1, d2, d3, d4)),
    date_tbl = {
      dts <- c(d1, d2, d3, d4)
      tbl <- table(dts)
      list(tbl)
    },
    # mode date (most frequent)
    mode_date = {
      dts <- c(d1, d2, d3, d4)
      dts <- dts[!is.na(dts)]
      if (length(dts) == 0) {
        as.Date(NA)
      } else {
        tbl <- table(dts)
        as.Date(names(tbl)[which.max(tbl)])
      }
    },
    # count how many match mode
    n_match_mode = {
      dts <- c(d1, d2, d3, d4)
      sum(dts == mode_date, na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # only fix if exactly 3 match and 1 differs
    checkin_datetime = if (isTRUE(implausible_time_order_full) && n_match_mode == 3 && !is.na(d1) && d1 != mode_date) {
      update(checkin_datetime, year = year(mode_date), month = month(mode_date), mday = mday(mode_date))
    } else {
      checkin_datetime
    },
    firstmedadmin_datetime = if (isTRUE(implausible_time_order_full) && n_match_mode == 3 && !is.na(d2) && d2 != mode_date) {
      update(firstmedadmin_datetime, year = year(mode_date), month = month(mode_date), mday = mday(mode_date))
    } else {
      firstmedadmin_datetime
    },
    lastmedadmin_datetime = if (isTRUE(implausible_time_order_full) && n_match_mode == 3 && !is.na(d3) && d3 != mode_date) {
      update(lastmedadmin_datetime, year = year(mode_date), month = month(mode_date), mday = mday(mode_date))
    } else {
      lastmedadmin_datetime
    },
    discharge_datetime = if (isTRUE(implausible_time_order_full) && n_match_mode == 3 && !is.na(d4) && d4 != mode_date) {
      update(discharge_datetime, year = year(mode_date), month = month(mode_date), mday = mday(mode_date))
    } else {
      discharge_datetime
    }
  ) %>%
  select(-d1, -d2, -d3, -d4, -dates_vec, -date_tbl, -mode_date, -n_match_mode) %>%
  ungroup()

# recheck
df_ic3 <- df_ic3 %>%
  mutate(
    implausible_time_order_full =
      !is.na(checkin_datetime) & !is.na(firstmedadmin_datetime) &
      !is.na(lastmedadmin_datetime) & !is.na(discharge_datetime) &
      !(checkin_datetime <= firstmedadmin_datetime &
          firstmedadmin_datetime <= lastmedadmin_datetime &
          lastmedadmin_datetime <= discharge_datetime)
  )
sum(df_ic$implausible_time_order_full, na.rm = TRUE)

#quick count
df_ic3 %>% summarise(n_implausible = sum(implausible_time_order_full, na.rm = TRUE),
                    pct_implausible = 100 * mean(implausible_time_order_full, na.rm = TRUE))

df_ic3 <- df_ic3 %>% 
  filter(!implausible_time_order_full)

consort_table <- rbind(consort_table, 
                       data.frame(step = "df_ic3: removing ALL impossible date values (e.g., discharge before med given)",
                                  included = nrow(df_ic3),
                                  excluded = consort_table$included[4] - nrow(df_ic3)
                                  ))

##Disposition
discharge_labels <- c("Home", "ED for ongoing care", "ED for hospital admission", "Direct hospital admission", "Other")
df_ic1$disposition <- discharge_labels[df_ic1$disposition]

table(df_ic1$disposition, useNA = "ifany")

df_ic1.1 <- df_ic1 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(disposition))

consort_table <- rbind(consort_table, 
                       data.frame(step = "df_ic1.1: Remove those with no disposition info",
                                  included = nrow(df_ic1.1),
                                  excluded = nrow(df_ic1) - nrow(df_ic1.1)
                                  ))

```

# Data cleaning for ED
```{r}
##Consort table
#Blank Table to Build Consort Data
consort_table_ed <- data.frame(
  step = character(),
  included = numeric(),
  excluded = numeric(),   # should be numeric to match NA_real_
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

consort_table_ed <- rbind(consort_table_ed, 
                       data.frame(step = "Raw data: all sites",
                                  included = nrow(df_ed) + nrow(df_ed_vcu),
                                  excluded = NA_real_
                                  ))

##Look at minimally useful columns
intersect(names(df_ed_vcu), names(df_ed)); setdiff(names(df_ed_vcu), names(df_ed)); setdiff(names(df_ed), names(df_ed_vcu))

##Rename
dfs <- list(df_ed = df_ed,
            df_ed_vcu = df_ed_vcu)

dfs <- lapply(dfs, \(df) {
  df$site_id <- df$ed_q02
  df$first_painscore <- df$ed_q07
  df$last_painscore <- df$ed_q08
  df$checkin_datetime <- df$ed_q04_dt
  df$firstmedadmin_datetime <- df$ed_q05_dt
  df$lastmedadmin_datetime <- df$ed_q06_dt
  df$discharge_datetime <- df$ed_q09_dt
  df$disposition <- df$ed_q10
  df
})

##Standardize missingness

#What classes are present in each df (and how many columns of each class)
type_summary <- lapply(dfs, \(d) {
  cls <- sapply(d, \(x) class(x)[1])  
  sort(table(cls), decreasing = TRUE)
})

type_summary

#Possible missingness strings
missing_chr <- c("", "na", "n/a", "null", "none", "unknown", "unk", ".", "..", "-", "--")
missing_num <- c(-9, -99, -999, 999, 9999)

dfs <- lapply(dfs, \(df) {
  df %>%
    # 1) character: trim whitespace + convert common "missing strings" to NA
    mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) {
      x <- trimws(x)
      x[tolower(x) %in% missing_chr] <- NA_character_
      x
    })) %>%
    # 2) numeric: convert sentinel codes to NA
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) {
      x[x %in% missing_num] <- NA_real_
      x
    })) %>%
    # 3) integer: convert sentinel codes to NA
    mutate(across(where(is.integer), \(x) {
      x[x %in% missing_num] <- NA_integer_
      x
    })) 
})

##Handle datetime
dfs$df_ed <- dfs$df_ed %>% 
  mutate(checkin_datetime = parse_date_time(checkin_datetime, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC"),
         firstmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(firstmedadmin_datetime, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC"),
         lastmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(lastmedadmin_datetime, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC"),
         discharge_datetime = parse_date_time(discharge_datetime, orders = "ymd HM", tz = "UTC")
  )
dfs$df_ed_vcu <- dfs$df_ed_vcu %>% 
  mutate(checkin_datetime = as.POSIXct((as.numeric(checkin_datetime) - 25569) * 86400, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC"),
         firstmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(firstmedadmin_datetime, orders = "mdy HM", tz = "UTC"),
         lastmedadmin_datetime = parse_date_time(lastmedadmin_datetime, orders = "mdy HM", tz = "UTC"),
         discharge_datetime = as.POSIXct((as.numeric(discharge_datetime) - 25569) * 86400, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC")
  )


#check
head(dfs$df_ed$checkin_datetime)
head(dfs$df_ed$firstmedadmin_datetime)

head(dfs$df_ed_vcu$checkin_datetime)
head(dfs$df_ed_vcu$firstmedadmin_datetime)

##Normalize text
dfs <- lapply(dfs, \(df) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) tolower(trimws(x))))
})

```
